meta.title: gemm-apps — Boutique Digital Product Studio
meta.description: gemm-apps is a boutique digital product studio founded by Pablo Romano. We build internal products with structure, identity, and soul.

hero.subheadline: gemm-apps is a boutique product studio founded by Pablo Romano. We build on proven foundations and adapt strategically to real businesses.

about.title: Not a software factory.
about.description: We start from proven modular foundations and adapt them strategically to each client's real context. Every project is a product, not an order.

products.title: Products in evolution.
products.intro: These are products we actively build and evolve. Each one starts from a proven foundation and adapts to real business contexts. No hype. Just structure, intent, and iteration.

kairo.name: Kairo
kairo.description: Intelligent planning system for teams and operational processes.

crmPilar.name: CRM-Pilar
crmPilar.description: Modular internal operations system for growing organizations.

menuQr.name: MenuQR
menuQr.description: Dynamic digital menu with ordering system and real-time updates.

discountEngine.name: Discount Engine
discountEngine.description: Flexible benefits, discounts, and loyalty infrastructure.

scamRadar.name: Scam Radar
scamRadar.description: Validation and alert system against digital scams and fraud.

studioSlot.name: Got a project?
studioSlot.description: We collaborate on selected strategic projects. Let's talk.

studio.title: From the Studio.
studio.description: This is where ideas take shape: experiments, build logs, thoughts, process.

post0.title: Designing without templates
post0.excerpt: Every product starts with a real context. Not with a pre-built template.

post1.title: Build log: Kairo v0.3
post1.excerpt: How we rethought the planning data model when the first one didn't survive real usage.

post2.title: Experiment: UI without components
post2.excerpt: An interface built with CSS Grid and semantics only. No libraries.

post3.title: On the identity of an internal product
post3.excerpt: Why products that nobody sees externally also deserve design and character.

post4.title: Build log: MenuQR offline mode
post4.excerpt: Implementing Service Workers in a restaurant context with unstable connectivity.

post5.title: Modularity is not magic
post5.excerpt: What it actually means to have a modular foundation and when it's worth it.

post6.title: Experiment: AI-generated reports
post6.excerpt: Testing LLM integration to summarize operational data. Honest results.

post7.title: Build log: Scam Radar MVP
post7.excerpt: From the initial problem —affecting real people— to the first working validation flow.

post8.title: When not to build a product
post8.excerpt: Some projects arrive and the honest answer is: this doesn't need software yet.

philosophy.pair3a: Every decision comes from real context.
philosophy.pair3b: Not from trends. Not from shortcuts.

collaborations.title: We partner with builders.
collaborations.copy1: Beyond our own products, we collaborate on selected strategic projects.
collaborations.copy2: We don't take volume. We take vision.

founder.title: Founded by Pablo Romano.
founder.bio2: Gemm-apps is the vehicle for structured digital products — designed with intent, built to evolve.

contact.headline: Let's build something that grows.
contact.subheadline: If you have a real project or want to explore a collaboration, reach out.
